title: acantholimon bromifolium var. iranicum
intro: Acantholimon bromifolium var. iranicum, also known as a type of cushion plant, is a flowering plant that belongs to the Plumbaginaceae family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Acantholimon bromifolium var. iranicum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate congestion, and soothe sore throats. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically dried and used as a tea or made into a decoction to harness its medicinal properties.
